error_handling.summary: Structured error field on DiscoveryResult, HTTP 502 for upstream errors, differentiated rate-limit vs auth-fail messages

dedup_strategy.summary: Submit all skills, let bulk endpoint dedup handle already-verified/pending

ui_simplification.summary: Remove select phase entirely, auto-submit all discovered skills, clean up dead code

done_phase.summary: Flat result list with badges, no plugin-grouped selection UI

fallback_behavior.summary: Return empty result with error field, never throw from discovery
